meta.title: Enterprise Observability Rollout Status
meta.description: A proof-backed status brief for the Lev enterprise observability rollout through S15, with acceptance commands and remaining S16/S17 gates.

props.title: Rollout proof status through S15
props.subtitle: Owner-local contracts, proof-backed projections, and adversarial fixtures are in place. Production certification is intentionally still blocked on S16/S17.

props.content: This page summarizes what has been implemented and how to accept it today. The useful takeaway: the rollout now has broad contract, projection, and negative-fixture coverage across execution evidence, telemetry, surfaces, dashboards, GenUI, and AI SRE. It should not be called enterprise production-certified until the project-level Pentagon/UltraQA rollout gate and capability certification gate are complete.

props.label: Rollout slices in the plan index
Representative smoke tests passed in this review
TRUTH BOUNDARY
props.title: What is accepted now vs. what remains blocked
props.subtitle: This is the distinction that keeps the architecture from turning into split-brain observability.

props.title: Accept today
props.content: S0-S15 are acceptable as owner-local contract and projection implementation. Receipts exist for admission authority, runtime checkpoints, proof bundles, replay/session readers, telemetry, monitor/incident state, eval/bench, Poly/surface parity, graph/API projections, AgentPing HITL, GenUI/lev.now, and AI SRE sandbox hardening.

props.title: Do not accept yet
props.content: Do not call this production-certified enterprise observability. S16 still needs the project-level Pentagon/UltraQA rollout gate, and S17 still needs capability-level production certification with current receipts, traces, GateProof, claim verdicts, and benchmark refs.

items.title: Proposal index and parity map locked
items.description: The rollout index validates with 16 slices. The observability/eval map validates with 28 canonical capability slices and no diagnostics.

items.title: Authority, checkpoint, and proof contracts
items.description: Admission authority, runtime checkpoint receipts, capability proof contracts, and fail-closed evidence models landed in owner-local contracts.

items.title: Evidence, replay, telemetry, and incidents
items.description: Run evidence, replay packets, read-only sessions, telemetry query/live-tail/export, monitor/probe status, incidents, alerts, and status projections now have negative fixtures.

items.title: Eval/bench, surfaces, and graph/API read model
items.description: Eval scorecards, benchmark budgets, conformance gates, Poly operation catalog, SDK/CLI/MCP/HTTP/gRPC/WS parity, and projection-only graph/API routes are in place.

items.title: AgentPing, GenUI, and AI SRE sandbox
items.description: AgentPing HITL, lev.now proof-dashboard IR, meta dashboard exports, AI SRE analysis, sandbox repair, and HITL apply rules now block false-green paths.

items.title: Pentagon/UltraQA rollout gate and production certification
items.description: Next step: implement the project-local Pentagon suite and keep the gate failing closed until all capability-level Pentagon, UltraQA, and benchmark receipts exist.

props.label: SLICE MATRIX
props.title: Current implementation status by workstream slice

rows: Plan ordering, slice coverage, validator scratch review
Tenant/provider/budget/HITL authority, checkpoint receipts, finite proof
Eval/bench, conformance, SDK/Poly/surface parity, graph/API projection
Proof-backed AgentPing, lev.now IR, HITL decisions, sandbox repair
Project-local suite must emit artifacts and fail closed on missing receipts
Capability-level promotion with current receipts, traces, GateProof, claims, benchmarks

props.label: ACCEPTANCE
props.title: Commands that passed in this review
props.subtitle: These commands verify the current contract/projection layer. They are not the final production promotion gate.

props.content:
lev task validate .lev/pm/tasks/observability-eval-full-parity-map-v1 --json
lev task validate .lev/pm/tasks/enterprise-observability-rollout-slice-coverage-v1 --json
pnpm --dir core/exec exec vitest run src/run-checkpoint.test.ts src/run-replay-index.test.ts src/handlers/exec-status.test.ts src/eval/ai-sre-ultraqa.test.ts
pnpm --dir core/telemetry exec vitest run tests/query.test.ts tests/live-tail.test.ts tests/export.test.ts tests/rum.test.ts
pnpm --dir core/poly exec vitest run src/__tests__/integration/observability-operation-envelope-surface-parity.test.ts src/__tests__/integration/observability-operation-ws-replay.test.ts src/__tests__/integration/observability-read-model-http.test.ts
pnpm --dir plugins/dashboard exec vitest run src/briefs/hitl.test.ts
pnpm --dir plugins/now exec vitest run tests/observability-ir.test.ts tests/observability-render-export.test.ts tests/observability-meta-dashboard.test.ts
pnpm --dir community/agentping --filter @agentping/dashboard-manager-ui test -- --run src/api/lev-observability.test.ts src/api/exec-traces.test.ts
pnpm --dir community/agentping --filter @lev-os/dashboard-manager-server test -- --run tests/lev-observability.test.ts tests/exec-traces.test.ts

props.label: ADVERSARIAL COVERAGE
props.title: False-green paths now covered by fixtures
Proofless green is blocked
props.content: Success text, dry-run output, provider self-report, dashboard props, and missing GateProof paths are treated as blocked or degraded.

props.title: Remote write authority is gated
props.content: Session inject requires lease, HITL approval, passing GateProof, confirmation token, and receipts. Read-only projections cannot mutate.

props.title: Telemetry is bounded and private
props.content: Malformed JSONL, interrupted writers, invalid cursors, stale exports, path traversal, secret logs, and unmasked RUM payloads produce diagnostics.

props.title: AI SRE cannot self-certify
props.content: Prompt injection, hidden secrets, sandbox escape diffs, stale HITL, missing rollback, and production_certifying=true are rejected.

props.title: Surface drift is caught
props.content: SDK, CLI, MCP, HTTP, gRPC, and WS fixtures check equivalent evidence fields and confirmation semantics from shared catalog metadata.

props.title: Dashboards stay projection-only
props.content: AgentPing and lev.now consume proof-backed read models; they do not become separate operational truth stores.

props.label: NEXT GATE
props.title: S16 should fail closed until capability receipts exist
props.subtitle: The next correct test is not a green production badge. It is a repeatable Pentagon run plus a gate that blocks incomplete certification.

props.content:
lev pentagon run --project . --suite enterprise-observability-rollout-s16 --json
! lev pentagon gate --project . --suite enterprise-observability-rollout-s16 --json

Expected result today: the run emits project-suite artifacts, and the gate fails closed because capability-level Pentagon, UltraQA, and Bxx benchmark receipts are incomplete. That is the right enterprise posture: incomplete proof is visible, not green.
